title: Quarantine Test Result
description: Schema for the test run result JSON written to .quarantine/<suite-name>/results.json by the CLI and uploaded as a GitHub Artifact. The dashboard ingests these files to build analytics.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this CI run.

branch.description: Git branch that triggered this test run.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA for this test run.

pr_number.description: Pull request number, if this run is associated with a PR. Null if not a PR build.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this test run completed.

suite_name.description: Name of the test suite that produced this result, matching test_suites[].name in .quarantine/config.yml. Used by the dashboard to associate results with the correct suite.

cli_mode.description: CLI auth mode. 'v1': CLI used QUARANTINE_GITHUB_TOKEN (PAT) and performed all GitHub writes itself. 'v2': CLI used GITHUB_TOKEN (read-only) and writes are deferred to the dashboard via artifact processing. Optional for backward compatibility with pre-M17 artifacts; the dashboard treats missing values as 'v1' (skip writes — safe default).

cli_version.description: Semantic version of the quarantine CLI that produced this result.

config.description: Configuration values that were active for this run.

retry_count.description: Number of retries configured for this suite run.

summary.description: Aggregate counts for this test run.

total.description: Total number of tests that were executed.

passed.description: Number of tests that passed on the first attempt.

failed.description: Number of tests that failed all retries (genuine failures).

skipped.description: Number of tests that were skipped by the test runner.

quarantined.description: Number of quarantined tests. For Jest/Vitest, these were excluded from execution. For RSpec, these ran but their failures were suppressed from the exit code.

flaky_detected.description: Number of tests newly detected as flaky in this run (failed initially, passed on retry).

unresolved.description: Number of tests whose rerun command failed or timed out. Cannot be classified as flaky or genuine failure.

test_entry.description: Result for a single test case.

file_path.description: File path component extracted from JUnit XML (framework-specific).

classname.description: Class name from the JUnit XML classname attribute.

name.description: Test name from the JUnit XML name attribute.

status.description: Final status after quarantine processing. 'quarantined': test ran but failure was ignored (issue still open). 'flaky': failed initially but passed on retry. 'unresolved': rerun command crashed or timed out — could not determine flaky vs genuine.

original_status.description: Status before quarantine processing. Present for quarantined and flaky tests; null for tests that were not modified by quarantine logic.

retries.description: Retry attempts for this test. Empty or absent if the test was not retried.

failure_message.description: Failure message from the test runner. Null if the test passed or was skipped.

issue_number.description: GitHub Issue number if this test is quarantined or newly flaky. Null otherwise.

issue_skipped_reason.description: Present only when GitHub Issue creation was skipped for a flaky test (ADR-022). 'new_file_in_pr': the test's file is new to this PR. 'new_test_in_pr': the test case was added to an existing file in this PR.

error.description: Present only for 'unresolved' tests. Human-readable description of why the rerun command failed (e.g., 'rerun command failed: exec: bundle not found in $PATH', 'rerun timed out after 5m').

rerun_exit_code.description: Present only for 'unresolved' tests where the rerun command exited with a non-zero code. The actual exit code from the crashed rerun process, for debugging.

retry_entry.description: A single retry attempt for a test.

duration_ms.description: Duration of this retry attempt in milliseconds.
